mapper.insert: INSERT INTO real_estate_trades ( trade_hash, source_file, no_in_file, sigungu, lot_number, main_number, sub_number, property_name, property_type, road_condition, rent_type, exclusive_area, contract_area, contract_year_month, contract_day, contract_date, deposit_amount, monthly_rent_amount, trade_amount, floor, built_year, road_name, canceled_date, deal_type, broker_location, registration_date, apartment_dong_name, buyer, seller, contract_period, contract_type, renewal_request_right, previous_deposit_amount, previous_monthly_rent_amount ) VALUES ( #{tradeHash}, #{sourceFile}, #{noInFile}, #{sigungu}, #{lotNumber}, #{mainNumber}, #{subNumber}, #{propertyName}, #{propertyType}, #{roadCondition}, #{rentType}, #{exclusiveArea}, #{contractArea}, #{contractYearMonth}, #{contractDay}, #{contractDate}, #{depositAmount}, #{monthlyRentAmount}, #{tradeAmount}, #{floor}, #{builtYear}, #{roadName}, #{canceledDate}, #{dealType}, #{brokerLocation}, #{registrationDate}, #{apartmentDongName}, #{buyer}, #{seller}, #{contractPeriod}, #{contractType}, #{renewalRequestRight}, #{previousDepositAmount}, #{previousMonthlyRentAmount} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE source_file = VALUES(source_file), no_in_file = VALUES(no_in_file), sigungu = VALUES(sigungu), lot_number = VALUES(lot_number), main_number = VALUES(main_number), sub_number = VALUES(sub_number), property_name = VALUES(property_name), property_type = VALUES(property_type), road_condition = VALUES(road_condition), rent_type = VALUES(rent_type), exclusive_area = VALUES(exclusive_area), contract_area = VALUES(contract_area), contract_year_month = VALUES(contract_year_month), contract_day = VALUES(contract_day), contract_date = VALUES(contract_date), deposit_amount = VALUES(deposit_amount), monthly_rent_amount = VALUES(monthly_rent_amount), trade_amount = VALUES(trade_amount), floor = VALUES(floor), built_year = VALUES(built_year), road_name = VALUES(road_name), canceled_date = VALUES(canceled_date), deal_type = VALUES(deal_type), broker_location = VALUES(broker_location), registration_date = VALUES(registration_date), apartment_dong_name = VALUES(apartment_dong_name), buyer = VALUES(buyer), seller = VALUES(seller), contract_period = VALUES(contract_period), contract_type = VALUES(contract_type), renewal_request_right = VALUES(renewal_request_right), previous_deposit_amount = VALUES(previous_deposit_amount), previous_monthly_rent_amount = VALUES(previous_monthly_rent_amount), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
